content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: header_auth_risk
H: x-user-id|401
P: verify|drop_hdr|keep_401|spoof_denied
V: header_auth_risk|x-user-id|401
A: verify|drop_hdr|keep_401|spoof_denied ∧ x-user-id|401|header_auth_r

[AUDIT]
Goal: header_auth_risk.
Hypothesis: x-user-id or 401.
Plan: verify or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied.
Verify: header_auth_risk or x-user-id or 401.
Answer target: verify or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied and x-user-id or 401 or header_auth_r.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: header ∧ auth ∧ risk
P: verify
V: spoof_denied
A: drop_hdr ∧ keep_401

[AUDIT]
Goal: header and auth and risk.
Plan: verify.
Verify: spoofed requests denied.
Answer target: drop the header path and keep 401 behavior.

G: header_auth_risk

Plan: verify or drop the header path.
Verify: keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied.
Answer target: header_auth_risk or x-signature or 401 or verify or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: auth_hdr_risk
H: download ∧ auth ∧ verify
P: drop_hdr ∧ keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied
V: auth_header_scope
A: verify_auth_on_download ∧ drop_auth_hdr_on_cross_origin

[AUDIT]
Goal: auth_hdr_risk.
Hypothesis: download and auth and verify.
Plan: drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Verify: auth_header_scope.
Answer target: verify_auth_on_download and drop_auth_hdr_on_cross_origin.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: sort ∧ "SELECT" ∧ header ∧ auth ∧ risk
H: verify ∧ drop_hdr ∧ keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied
P: "SELECT" ∧ header ∧ auth
V: risk ∧ spoof_denied ∧ keep_401
A: sort ∧ verify ∧ drop_hdr

[AUDIT]
Goal: sort and "SELECT" and header and auth and risk.
Hypothesis: verify and drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Plan: "SELECT" and header and auth.
Verify: risk and spoofed requests denied and keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: sort and verify and drop the header path.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: verify ∧ "ETag" ∧ "304" ∧ header ∧ auth ∧ risk ∧ keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied
H: drop_hdr ∧ "ETag" ∧ keep_401
V: keep_401
A: drop_hdr

[AUDIT]
Goal: verify and "ETag" and "304" and header and auth and risk and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Hypothesis: drop the header path and "ETag" and keep 401 behavior.
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: drop the header path.
